order.emailDescription: Enter the email address where you want to receive the product. The invoice will be sent to your email address.
order.referralDescription: Were you referred by someone? Enter the referral code here.
order.couponDescription: If you have a discount coupon, enter it here to apply the discount.
order.paymentSuccessDescription: Your order has been successfully paid. Delivery information will be sent to your email within 15 minutes.
order.paymentNotAvailable: Payment through this method is temporarily unavailable. Please choose another payment method.
order.paymentMethodNotAvailable: This payment method is currently unavailable. Please use your account balance.
order.paymentMethodDisabled: This payment method is currently disabled
order.noKeysAvailable: No product keys available. Please contact support.
order.paymentInstructionsDescription: To complete the payment via {method} service, please review the attached instructions by following the link.
order.contactSupportDescription: To pay via {method}, please contact our support team through one of the channels below:
order.paymentInstructionDescription: To continue with payment, please review the instructions on the external resource.
order.instructionStep2: Follow the instructions to top up your balance
order.instructionStep3: Return to this page and complete the payment
order.paymentNote: You will be redirected to an external resource to view the instructions.
order.paymentFailedDescription: Unfortunately, your payment could not be processed. Please try again or choose another payment method.
order.checkEmailForDetails: Check your email for order details and product keys
order.accessDenied: Access to this order is denied
order.alreadyPaid: This order has already been paid
order.waitingForPaymentDescription: The payment page has been opened in a new window. Complete the payment there — this page will update automatically.

antilopay.name: SBP / Russian Cards
antilopay.description: Pay via SBP or Russian bank cards

stripe.name: International Card Payment
stripe.description: Pay with cards worldwide, except Belarus and Russia

pally.name: Pay via Pally
pally.description: Use this service if payment through the main gateway failed

balanceRub.name: SITE BALANCE (RUB)
balanceRub.description: Pay with your site balance in rubles

balanceUsd.name: SITE BALANCE (USD)
balanceUsd.description: Pay with your site balance in dollars
